titleStmt.title: SII 36.131: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 131. (A.R. No. 131 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On a pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mūlasthāṉēśvara temple.

p.hi: No king. (Māṟavarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya I). Year 13+1+1: A.D. 1230.

summary.p: This inscription is related to No. 133 below. Some portions of the inscription could not be traced. The inscription records the royal order issued by the king M. Sundarapāṇḍya I, assigning 3(1/2) vēlis as dēvadāṉa iraiyili to the temple of Śrīvallava Viṇṇagar Āḻvār on the western bank (of the Vaigai river ?) at Chōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāgaṉūrkūṟṟam for offerings. The taxes exempted are antarāyam, viṉiyōkam and mākkalam. The uḷvari was signed by three officers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Antarā
yamum viṉiyoka
mum māk kalamum
Uṭpaṭat tevatā
ṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭ
ṭapaṭikku Uḷvari
pākaṉūṟ kūṟṟa
ttu coḻakulānta
kac caturvveti maṅkala
ttu melkarai śrī
vallava viṇṇa
kar Āḻvārkku tiru
ppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷi
ṭṭu veṇṭun nivan
taṅkaḷukkup patiṉ mū
ṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
(melait tū
ṇi le)
pilāṟṟukku me
ṟkuk kūvāṇi va
tikku vaṭakkum
karuṇākara vatikku
vaṭakkum Ivvā
ḻvār kārāṇ
maiyāṉa kol
lai nilam Uṭpa
ṭap pāṭakappaṭi
mūṉṟarai veli
nilam patiṉ mū
ṉṟāvatiṉetirā
māṇṭiṉetirā
māṇṭu mutal A
ntarāyamum vi
ṉiyokamum mā
kkalamum Uṭ
paṭat tevatā
ṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka
Iṭṭuk keḻvi
yum variyilār E
ḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyu
m tarac coṉṉo
m kaikkoṇṭu
tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum
nivantaṅkaḷ ce
llappaṇṇi Ippa
ṭi cantirātittavaṟ
celvatākak kal
lilum cempilu
m veṭṭivittu
k koḷka Ivai ma
turotaiya vaḷanā
ṭṭu kāñaiy Iruk
kai Uḻakkuṭi mu
ttaṉ Āṭko
ṇṭa villiyā
ṉa mīṉavatarai
yaṉ Eḻuttu yā
ṇṭu patiṉmūṉ
ṟāvatu nāḷ Āyi
rattorupattañcu
Ivai Aṇṭa nā
ṭṭup perumaṇa
lūr mantari Irā
maṉāṉa Uttaraman
tari Eḻuttu Ivai
Aṇṭa nāṭṭu pe
rumaṇalūr manta
ri Ātittatevaṉāṉa
pallavarājaṉ E
ḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 36.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
